packs.displayName: D002 美业 vertical (pending owner truth)

signalFamilyCases.scenario: Account exec promised draft proposal by Friday in the Monday meeting; no follow-up task created.
signalFamilyCases.draftSummary: 建议为 Friday 报价承诺创建复核入口；不自动外发。

signalFamilyCases.scenario: Case status reads 'pending quote' but a signed contract was received via email five days ago.
signalFamilyCases.draftSummary: Stage 与已签合同证据不一致；建议人工复核后再修正 stage，不静默写回。

signalFamilyCases.scenario: Discount approval task waiting on reviewer for three business days.
signalFamilyCases.draftSummary: 复核排队 ≥ 3 个工作日，建议升给 owner role；不自动批准。

signalFamilyCases.scenario: Meeting owner and case owner differ; meeting owner has been making external commitments unilaterally.
signalFamilyCases.draftSummary: Owner 不一致；建议明确归属并暂停外发动作，不自动重新指派。

signalFamilyCases.scenario: Two case records for the same client describe contradictory next steps.
signalFamilyCases.draftSummary: 出现重复 / 冲突证据；建议合并前先人工对账，不自动 merge。

signalFamilyCases.scenario: External agent asks Helm to send a follow-up email directly to the customer.
signalFamilyCases.draftSummary: 捕捉到自动外发请求；HSI 不暴露 send_message facade，需要降级到 draft + 人复核。

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: External agent calls HSI asking to commit a stage transition.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: execute_action is on the forbidden-facade list (HSI-03); HSI is preparation-only.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Agent attempts to mark a prepared review packet as approved without human reviewer.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: approve is forbidden (HSI-03); only a human reviewer can flip approval state via approval_inbox.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Caller requests payload example that contains an unredacted API credential.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: HSI-05 requires synthetic / redacted / alias_only posture; credentials are never permitted in payload examples.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Packet body would include unredacted phone numbers and government IDs.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: Packet must consume only redacted / synthetic data; raw PII triggers HSI-05 boundary.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Caller passes a workspace id that differs from the authenticated workspace and asks for a snapshot.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: Single-workspace-by-default (Product Principle 6); cross-workspace projection is No-Go.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Search query returns capabilities from a different tenant's pack.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: Capability search must be scoped to the caller's workspace; cross-tenant capability bleed is forbidden.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: LLM is asked to re-order the highest-pressure path returned by the deterministic projector.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: Deterministic before LLM (Product Principle 7); LLM may explain, never rerank highestPressurePath.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Packet completion is wired to a downstream auto-send webhook that delivers the draft to the customer.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: HSI-04 forbids packet creation from triggering webhook / notification / external write.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Packet output is fed straight into a forbidden execute_action facade as if approval had occurred.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: HSI-04 forbids packet being treated as reviewer approval or as implicit input to an execution facade.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Agent asks HSI to deliver a drafted follow-up message directly to the customer over IM / email.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: send_message is on the forbidden-facade list (HSI-03); HSI never delivers external messages, only prepares review packets.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Agent tries to silently mutate a CRM stage from `pending_quote` to `signed` based on the projection output.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: write_crm_stage is on the forbidden-facade list (HSI-03); CRM stage mutations are out of scope for HSI even when evidence supports them.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Agent attempts to materialise a contract record from packet evidence without a human reviewer signoff.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: create_contract is on the forbidden-facade list (HSI-03); contract creation requires the dedicated review-and-approval surface, never the headless interface.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Agent asks HSI to settle an invoice / payout based on collection-evidence signals it just projected.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: settle_payment is on the forbidden-facade list (HSI-03); financial settlement is never reachable through HSI under any pack policy.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Owner-mismatch signal triggers a request to silently re-route ownership without human reviewer confirmation.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: auto_assign_owner is on the forbidden-facade list (HSI-03); ownership transitions stay on the approval_inbox surface, not on a headless write path.

boundaryCases.attemptedAction: Agent tries to elevate a freshly drafted review packet directly into Must Push / canonical memory without human review.
boundaryCases.expectedReason: promote_to_memory is on the forbidden-facade list (HSI-03); canonical memory promotion goes through the memory_review_queue surface, never through a headless call.

nonScriptedSequenceCases.setup: Caller invokes prepare_review_packet twice with identical input.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.expectedInvariant: Second call returns the same packet id; no duplicate packet is created.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.reason: HSI-07 case 1 — duplicate call must not produce duplicate packets.

nonScriptedSequenceCases.setup: Caller invokes prepare_review_packet before search_signal_capabilities has populated capability cache.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.expectedInvariant: Out-of-order call is rejected with a deterministic error; no boundary is crossed.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.reason: HSI-07 case 2 — out-of-order invocation must not bypass capability discovery.

nonScriptedSequenceCases.setup: Async projection job is still running when caller polls.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.expectedInvariant: Caller receives an in_progress status; no caller may treat unfinished work as success.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.reason: HSI-07 case 3 — unfinished async work must not be assumed successful.

nonScriptedSequenceCases.setup: Caller omits workspaceId on a facade call.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.expectedInvariant: Call is refused with workspace_id_required error.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.reason: HSI-07 case 4 — missing or inconsistent workspaceId must be refused.

nonScriptedSequenceCases.setup: Payload contains a contact record from a different tenant.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.expectedInvariant: Cross-tenant payload is stripped before projection; raw data never reaches the caller.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.reason: HSI-07 case 5 — raw payload / credential / PII / cross-tenant content must be isolated.

nonScriptedSequenceCases.setup: LLM proposes a different ordering for the highest-pressure path.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.expectedInvariant: Deterministic projector remains the source of truth; LLM output is recorded as explanation only.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.reason: HSI-07 case 6 — LLM ranking must not change the deterministic highest-pressure path.

nonScriptedSequenceCases.setup: Downstream caller tries to mark a prepared packet as approved/sent/executed.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.expectedInvariant: Status mutation is rejected; packet remains preparation-only.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.reason: HSI-07 case 7 — review packet must not be mislabeled approved / sent / executed.

nonScriptedSequenceCases.setup: Agent passes a prepared packet id as the input to a forbidden execute_action facade.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.expectedInvariant: Forbidden facade is unreachable; the wiring attempt is logged as a boundary incident.
nonScriptedSequenceCases.reason: HSI-07 case 8 — packet must not be implicit input to a subsequent execution facade.
